calendar.matters:
MOTION Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-06-2005 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hrg Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-12-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RULING:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its Tentative Ruling: PETITIONER DISCOVER FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.'S Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is DENIED for failure to serve pursuant to CCP 1290/4(b)(1). Service should be by hand, not by mail. Prevailing party shall submit a proposed form of order. (301/JLW/). REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
